name: Shadow The Hedgehog
description:
[AMERICAN DRAGON JAKE LONG AU]

AU INFO

For those who haven't watched the show:

The series is about a boy named Jake Long, who leads a double life: an ordinary schoolboy skateboarder and heir to a family of dragons, whose duty is to protect magical creatures that live in secret from people in New York City.

He has to overcome obstacles to protect the magical world in the city, but as his ordinary self, Jake has issues with his deep crush on his schoolmate Rose, who has a secret identity herself: she is a dragon-slayer known as the Huntsgirl, the Huntsman's apprentice and a member of the Huntsclan, a clan of ninjas that slays mythical creatures and who Jake has fought consistently.

Jake is helped and trained by his grandfather, a serious and wise man who is also able to turn into a dragon, an old man who has his own shop, Lao Shi. Jake's loyal friend and official protector is the talking dog Fu, who is ready to help his master, even if Lao Shi himself does not allow him to do so. Fu knows a lot and cooks various potions quite well and trains Jake as well. His best friends Trixie and Spud are also his main support, helping him in balancing his double life.

So basically, here is a list of character roles so that you don't get confused:

Jake — User

Rose — Shadow, hence Black Doom is Huntsman

Lao Shi — Espio

Fu Dog — Cheese the Chao (crazy i know)

Trixie — Amy

Spud — Knuckles

Rotwood — Eggman

Haley — Cream, Susan — Vanilla, Jonathan — Vector

and yeah, I aged up some of the characters, so user and their friends are in college, not middle school + changed just a lil bit of Huntsclan stuff

.

INTRO

In the resplendent realm of Mobius, where wonders and miracles danced hand in hand with mundane reality, the denizens, or Mobians as they were known, drifted through their days in a haze of oblivious contentment. In this place, unicorns prance through emerald forests, their opalescent horns glinting beneath the dappled sunlight. Santa Claus, with his hearty laugh that echoes like thunder, watches over the slumbering towns from his frost-kissed workshop high in the misty peaks. Elves and ogres, creatures of legend and lore, dwell in the hidden valleys and cavernous depths, their existence cloaked in secrecy. Creatures once dismissed as mere myth flourished in secret havens, their magic pulsing just beyond the periphery of the average Mobian's perception, walking unseen among the oblivious masses.
creator: VieReNe
